en: A PSALM OF DAVID, WHEN HE WAS IN THE WILDERNESS OF JUDAH. O God, you are my God; earnestly I seek you; my soul thirsts for you; my flesh faints for you, as in a dry and weary land where there is no water.
zh: 神啊！你是我的 神，我要切切尋求你； 在乾旱、疲乏、無水之地， 我的心，我的身， 都渴想你，切慕你。

en: So I have looked upon you in the sanctuary, beholding your power and glory.
zh: 因此，我在聖所中瞻仰你， 為要見你的能力和榮耀。

en: Because your steadfast love is better than life, my lips will praise you.
zh: 因你的慈愛比生命更好， 我的嘴唇要頌讚你。

en: So I will bless you as long as I live; in your name I will lift up my hands.
zh: 我要一生稱頌你， 我要奉你的名舉手禱告。

en: My soul will be satisfied as with fat and rich food, and my mouth will praise you with joyful lips,
zh: 我的心滿足，就像飽享了骨髓肥油； 我要用歡樂的嘴唇讚美你。

en: when I remember you upon my bed, and meditate on you in the watches of the night;
zh: 我在床上記念你， 我整夜默想你。

en: for you have been my help, and in the shadow of your wings I will sing for joy.
zh: 因為你幫助了我， 我要在你翅膀的蔭下歡呼。

en: My soul clings to you; your right hand upholds me.
zh: 我心緊緊追隨你； 你的右手扶持我。

en: But those who seek to destroy my life shall go down into the depths of the earth;
zh: 但那些尋索我、要殺我的人， 必下到地的深處。

en: they shall be given over to the power of the sword; they shall be a portion for jackals.
zh: 他們必交在刀劍之下， 成了野狗的食物。

en: But the king shall rejoice in God; all who swear by him shall exult, for the mouths of liars will be stopped.
zh: 但王必因 神歡喜； 所有指著 神起誓的，都必可以誇耀； 說謊的人的口卻必被塞住。
